name: WHRO Newsroom

title: News Director

name: Louis Hansen
organization: Virginia Center for Investigative Journalism at WHRO
title: Senior Editor
personalized_pitch: Present the case as a records-driven accountability inquiry with a documented chronology, source list, and clear distinction between confirmed facts and allegations.
notes: High-priority investigative contact. Verify current role before sending.

notes: Use official staff directory or tip form until a current public newsroom email is verified.
